response: Start by reading nutrition labels to identify hidden sugars in your [favorite snack]. Replace sugary drinks with water or herbal tea to reduce your daily intake. Incorporate more whole fruits like [fruit name] to satisfy sweet cravings naturally. Gradually decrease added sugar in your morning coffee or tea to adjust your taste buds. Plan your meals ahead of time to avoid impulse purchases of processed sweets. Focus on cooking at home using fresh ingredients instead of relying on pre-packaged options. Consistency is key, so track your progress in a food diary or app.
